사무엘하 8:1.content: After this, David struck the Philistines and subdued them; and David took the bridle of the mother city out of the hand of the Philistines.

사무엘하 8:2.content: He struck Moab, and measured them with the line, making them to lie down on the ground; and he measured two lines to put to death, and one full line to keep alive. The Moabites became servants to David, and brought tribute.

사무엘하 8:3.content: David struck also Hadadezer the son of Rehob, king of Zobah, as he went to recover his dominion at the River.

사무엘하 8:4.content: David took from him one thousand seven hundred horsemen and twenty thousand footmen. David hamstrung all the chariot horses, but reserved of them for one hundred chariots.

사무엘하 8:5.content: When the Syrians of Damascus came to help Hadadezer king of Zobah, David struck twenty two thousand men of the Syrians.

사무엘하 8:6.content: Then David put garrisons in Syria of Damascus; and the Syrians became servants to David, and brought tribute. Yahweh gave victory to David wherever he went.

사무엘하 8:7.content: David took the shields of gold that were on the servants of Hadadezer, and brought them to Jerusalem.

사무엘하 8:8.content: From Betah and from Berothai, cities of Hadadezer, king David took a great quantity of bronze.

사무엘하 8:9.content: When Toi king of Hamath heard that David had struck all the army of Hadadezer,

사무엘하 8:10.content: then Toi sent Joram his son to king David, to greet him, and to bless him, because he had fought against Hadadezer and struck him; for Hadadezer had wars with Toi. Joram brought with him vessels of silver, vessels of gold, and vessels of bronze.

사무엘하 8:11.content: King David also dedicated these to Yahweh, with the silver and gold that he dedicated of all the nations which he subdued;

사무엘하 8:12.content: of Syria, of Moab, of the children of Ammon, of the Philistines, of Amalek, and of the plunder of Hadadezer, son of Rehob, king of Zobah.

사무엘하 8:13.content: David earned a reputation when he returned from striking down eighteen thousand men of the Syrians in the Valley of Salt.

사무엘하 8:14.content: He put garrisons in Edom. Throughout all Edom, he put garrisons, and all the Edomites became servants to David. Yahweh gave victory to David wherever he went.

사무엘하 8:15.content: David reigned over all Israel; and David executed justice and righteousness for all his people.

사무엘하 8:16.content: Joab the son of Zeruiah was over the army, Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder,

사무엘하 8:17.content: Zadok the son of Ahitub and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar were priests, Seraiah was scribe,

사무엘하 8:18.content: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and the Pelethites, and David’s sons were chief ministers.
